meta._repo_note: Template flow for Make. Export your working scenario from Make and replace this file for a production-ready blueprint.
meta.scenario_name: Daily Pull — RSS & CSV → Raw Leads

flow.action: Read feed items (per marketplace feed URL)
Extract title, description snippet, price from title or description
Geocode Location string → lat/lng or normalized city (respect API key & quotas)
Table: Raw Leads — map Source, Title, Description, Price, Location, Category, Raw_Data (JSON), Timestamp, Status=New
Retry up to 3×; on failure → Slack message with bundle payload excerpt
Webhook or Google Drive watch → parse CSV → same Airtable Create mapping
